title: TabSwap
description: Just swaps your hotbar with inventory rows on a button press!
body:
![The TabSwap Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f542ea47a9e3ee92229e27abe7c2f0ba6a3cc7c.png)
# TabSwap
**Just swaps your hotbar with inventory rows on a button press!**


![MC keybind settings with "TabSwap" open showing "Swap Hotbar" being set to Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c772c3f9e8649bc9d19798e1057f6b501afbcc1_0.webp)

Tired of searching for a hotbar swapping mod, don't want to dig through menus to find a setting to enable it, or just want to include this as a handy addition to your modpack? Then TabSwap is for you!

There's a keybind to change what button cycles the hotbar; it's under "TabSwap" in the Key Binds settings page - Born out of a frustration that there isn't a mod that does this already - TabSwap solves em all :D




## Online Play Warning!

Use this mod only in singleplayer or on small private servers where the admins are fine with it. 

Avoid large networks or servers that issue bans for mods like "Bridging Mod", etc; you risk getting **_banned_**. It won’t work on Hypixel, ManaCube, etc.




### Icon by [vrtxd](https://vrtxd.wordpress.com/links/)
